remaining_tasks.name: All-day tasks: consistent full-day reminder display across all views

decisions.decision: Extracted shared AllDayBanner component approach preferred
decisions.rationale: DayView + DailyView both inline identical chip-row banners; WeekView/ThreeDayView/TimelineView/CalendarView missing allday handling entirely

decisions.decision: Visual companion server started at port 49713 but not used — session ended

next_action: Resume brainstorming for JUG-MED-10: shared AllDayBanner component design + per-view integration. Start fresh visual companion session. Key finding: DayView + DailyView have banners, CalendarView sort-only, WeekView/ThreeDayView/TimelineView have nothing.
context_notes: Phases 10, 11, 12 all shipped this session. All three were schema/code cleanup (drop legacy fields). JUG-MED-10 is next — UI consistency fix across 6 calendar views for all-day tasks.
